heading_content_part: Terms - Service and Privacy 06/24/2022Thank you for your interest in our application. This privacy policy tells you how we            use personal information collected at this site. Please read this privacy policy before using the            application or submitting any personal information. By using the application, you are accepting the            practices described in this privacy policy. These practices may be changed, but any changes will be posted
on this page. You are encouraged to review the privacy policy whenever you visit the site to make sure that            you understand how any personal information you provide will be used.

Cookie/Tracking TechnologyOur applications use Firebase Analytics to improve the user experience and gather            information such as browser type and operating system, tracking the number of visitors to the application,            and understanding how visitors use the application. In general, personal information cannot be collected via            Firebase Analytics and other tracking technology.

heading_content_part: Through our analytics provider Google Firebase Analytics and Google Play Services we            collect and/or have access to the following non-personal information:Device Information such as hardware manufacturer & model, operating system            version, screen size, CPU model, mobile network information.Aggregate App Usage Data - information about aggregate usage of the app.General Geographic Information - geographic and language information such as locale,            country, county, and city.
Distribution of InformationWe will not share your personal information or anything you submitted with 3rd            parties unless we are required by law or you have provided consent to do so.
